ab: marelrang ku kani malri mukuwa mudadangiya kani temama Awi a adaman.
ch: 昨天我和爸爸去拜訪Awi叔叔。
en: Yesterday, my father and I visited my uncle.

ab: mupanana tu kuwi ni temama Awi.
marengay kaniyam, tu sa’uv na ruma’ mu, ulra saya cavulang kema.
ch: 他告訴我們，房子的屋頂破了一個洞。
en: He told us that there was a hole in the roof of his house.

ab: tumulralre’ay kana sa’uv mu, mu’adulay di mutani lra kemay sawsa’uv.
ch: 他在修理屋頂時，從屋頂滑一跤就掉下來了。
en: He fell off the roof while repairing it.

ab: miinada da tiwngan a hung di puran i malri vaveray kani tamama Awi.
ch: 爸爸帶了牛肉和檳榔要給Awi叔叔的。
en: My father brought beef and betel nuts for my uncle.

ab: kadu mi kanantu vinseng madayadayar, kasaduwan tu vinavati pakinger kaniyam da vativatiyan.
ch: 我們在他的房間聊天，他說給我們聽了很多故事。
en: My uncle and I chatted in the room, and he shared many stories.

ab: muvavuruk mi mu, marengay i temama Awi da tihasar u lra di vangsar u lra kema kaningku.
ch: 我們正要離開時，叔叔對我說 你長高了又帥氣了。
en: Before I left, my uncle praised me for growing taller and becoming more handsome.

ab: tumuvang ku da ’’ lrayuwan! ama, nu ’inava lra nanu kuwi mu, kadika lra kaniyam mudadangiya mu! ’’ kema ku.
ch: 我回答：「謝謝！叔叔, 如果你的腳好了，也過來我們家玩喔！」我這麼說.
en: I said, "When your foot gets better, come to our house next time and visit us."
